message:
feat(ui): normalize source identity display and improve export metadata fidelity

Update the TUI layer to use the same source identity normalization applied in
the search pipeline, ensuring that whitespace-padded or case-variant source_id
values display consistently and do not create phantom source badges.

Key changes:

- New helper functions (hit_source_id_display, hit_agent_display, hit_title_display,
  hit_is_local_source, trimmed_non_empty, etc.) centralize display normalization
  for search hits, replacing ad-hoc string comparisons scattered across rendering
- SelectedHitKey gains conversation_id, title, and created_at fields to match
  the updated SearchHitKey, so selection survives pane reorder and reranking
  even when source_id normalization changes the displayed identity
- ResultSessionSummaryKey uses conversation_id as the authoritative grouping
  key when present, falling back to trimmed title for legacy hits
- pane_filter_matches_hit searches across normalized display fields including
  workspace_original, origin_host, and source label
- ExportModalState.from_hit prefers ConversationView metadata (agent_slug,
  workspace, title) over stale search-hit fields, preventing export filenames
  from drifting when the indexed conversation has been re-scanned
- ConversationView workspace display extracted into conversation_view_workspace_display
- conversation_view_matches_hit and search_hit_has_identity_hint helpers added
  to ui::data for callers that need to match hits to loaded conversation views
- load_conversation_for_hit replaces load_conversation_for_source with
  conversation_id-aware cache lookup
- ConversationCache.hash_key gains a cache_scope parameter and normalizes
  source_id values to prevent cache aliasing between raw and normalized IDs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
